# Science & Technology — The Year 2009

Developments in science and technology from the year 2009.

<!-- BEGIN GENERATED: category-index — maintained by build-structure; do not edit by hand -->
| Topic | Description |
|---|---|
| [H1N1 swine flu pandemic](h1n1-swine-flu-pandemic.md) | A novel H1N1 influenza strain emerged in Mexico and the United States in April; the WHO declared a Phase 6 pandemic on June 11 — the first influenza pandemic since 1968. |
| LHC first proton collisions | The Large Hadron Collider restarted after its 2008 quench incident and achieved first proton-proton collisions at 900 GeV on November 23, resuming the world's premier particle physics programme. |
| Bitcoin genesis block mined | Satoshi Nakamoto mined the first Bitcoin block (Block 0) on January 3, launching the world's first decentralized cryptocurrency and inaugurating a new era in digital finance. |
<!-- END GENERATED: category-index -->
